repos.name: pookNast/HiveMindFusion
repos.description: Multi-model AI gateway with fusion orchestration — routes across local and cloud LLMs through a single OpenAI-compatible API

repos.name: raydocs/fusion-deck
repos.description: 🃏 Three models gang up and out-argue the lone star. A Claude Code skill: a panel of Opus 4.8 + GPT-5.5 + Gemini 3.1 Pro judged into one answer — plus plan, context, orchestrate & handoff workflows. Runs on the subscriptions already on your machine.

repos.name: adu3110/tot-mcts
repos.description: Tree-of-Thought + Monte Carlo Tree Search over real LLM completions — pure Python + TypeScript, no frameworks

repos.name: billyvinning/langchain-mcts
repos.description: Improve LLM test-time reasoning with Monte Carlo Search Trees in Langchain.

repos.name: xinzhel/lits-llm
repos.description: A modular Python framework for building LLM agents with tree search (e.g., MCTS, BFS) and chain reasoning (e.g., ReAct) --- CiT [ACL2026 Findings], LiTS [ACL 2026 Demo], LiTS-Mem [Under Review]

repos.name: CallmeTruong/llm-reasoning-scaffolding
repos.description: A performance-driven comparison of LLM reasoning protocols, featuring a custom Monte Carlo Tree Search (MCTS) implementation. This benchmark evaluates how search-based scaffolding forces structured logic and error correction on the GSM8K dataset, contrasting the precision of MCTS-guided inference against traditional CoT and Best-of-N methods.

repos.name: Saksham4796/momentum-guided-test-time-search
repos.description: Momentum-guided test-time search for LLM reasoning on GSM8K. Implements vanilla decoding, Tree-of-Thoughts, MCTS, and a momentum-based search strategy with lookahead entropy scoring, dynamic branching/backtracking, MLX KV-cache acceleration, and CSV benchmarking for accuracy, latency, tokens, and memory.

repos.name: queelius/mcts-reasoning
repos.description: Monte Carlo Tree Search for LLM-based reasoning with fluent API and advanced sampling strategies

repos.name: gsavla6-hue/ai-game-playing-agent
repos.description: Intelligent game-playing agent using Monte Carlo Tree Search + LLM reasoning to play chess, checkers and custom text-based strategy games

repos.name: JianChengXingYun/Em-Mcts
repos.description: Empirical-MCTS: A dual-loop inference-time scaling framework that transforms stateless Monte Carlo Tree Search into continuous empirical learning. By unifying real-time meta-prompt evolution (PE-EMP) with global memory optimization, it enables LLMs to accumulate and reuse reasoning wisdom across problems—significantly boosting performance on comple

repos.name: aayambansal/ConsistPRM
repos.description: We introduce ConsistBench, a Z3-verified benchmark revealing that LLMs achieve 100% accuracy yet near-0% on negation probes, and show that Z3-verified labels are critical for training consistency-aware process reward models.

repos.name: 1223had123/Post-train-for-LLMs-simple-implementation-
repos.description: 一个未完成版的 post-training 学习样例项目，基于本地 Qwen 模型实现若干推理评测流程。当前仓库重点放在 prompt engineering、Chain-of-Thought、self-consistency 和多数据集评测脚手架上；SFT、PPO、DPO 等真正的训练阶段还在待实现列表中。

repos.name: VinayakMokashi/prompt-engineering-techniques
repos.description: Hands-on prompt-engineering techniques (few-shot & in-context learning, chain-of-thought, self-consistency, and embedding-based prompt evaluation) demonstrated with LangChain and Groq-hosted LLaMA models.

repos.name: he-yufeng/gsm8k-prompt-engineering
repos.description: Prompt-engineering study on LLM math reasoning (GSM8K) and code generation (HumanEval): zero/few-shot, self-consistency, self-verification, and experiments on prompt quality, complexity, demonstrations, and diversity.

repos.name: DHIWAHAR-K/Beyond-English-Multilingual-Self-Consistency-for-Robust-LLM-Reasoning
repos.description: Research: Does multilingual self-consistency improve LLM reasoning beyond math? Empirical study across 6 benchmarks (commonsense, ethics, NLI, knowledge) and 10 languages using Qwen2.5-32B and Aya Expanse 32B on Apple Silicon (MLX). Chain-of-thought + cross-lingual prompting.

repos.name: Evgeniy-Mikhailove/prompt-techniques-library
repos.description: Decision matrix for choosing the right prompting technique. 6 production patterns: CoT, ReAct, Chaining, ToT, RAG, Self-Consistency.

repos.name: somsomy499/prompt-engineering
repos.description: Systematic prompt engineering toolkit: chain-of-thought, few-shot, self-consistency, and A/B testing

repos.name: darrshangovender/thinking-loop
repos.description: Test-time reasoning compute. Five published strategies (CoT, Self-Consistency, Decomposition, ToT-Lite, Direct) behind one interface, adjudicated by a critic LLM, with calibrated confidence and hard budget guards. Reproducible benchmark included.

repos.name: tariqnasheed/Multi-LLM-comparator
repos.description: Compare any 3 LLMs side‑by‑side – latency, token usage, cost – with built‑in reasoning techniques (few‑shot, chain‑of‑thought, self‑consistency, self‑critique). Supports Mistral, DeepSeek, OpenAI, and any OpenAI‑compatible API. Zero‑dependency pain with uv sync.

repos.name: chaturvediaksh1304-sudo/news-to-trade-agent
repos.description: Multi-agent S&P 500 news-to-trade pipeline: numeric screener, LLM debate swarm, Alpaca paper trading, public reasoning log + Next.js dashboard

repos.name: Lyasuk/llm-debate-swarm
repos.description: Multi-LLM debate & arbitration engine: weighted multi-provider consensus + an N-agent debiasing debate swarm, aggregated into a calibrated probability.

repos.name: Rudra303/NovaScientist
repos.description: NovaScientist is an enterprise-grade, multi-agent AI framework for automated scientific discovery. Using a swarm of specialized LLM agents, it autonomously generates, debates, and refines novel scientific hypotheses. Features highly-parallelized asynchronous execution, real-time ELO tournament evaluation, and a robust FastAPI-driven backend.

repos.name: Yash-814800/ARGUS
repos.description: An autonomous multi-agent swarm for zero-touch microservice incident detection, AI-powered root cause analysis, and closed-loop remediation — driven by LLM debate, vector memory, and surgical safety guardrails.

repos.name: mdayan8/hive
repos.description: Swarm Intelligence That Predicts Anything. HIVE deploys autonomous AI agents to research, debate, and forecast any scenario — delivering intelligence briefs with probability scores, risk analysis, and actionable strategy.

repos.name: capitansuat/swarm-debate
repos.description: Multi-LLM debate engine with a shared expert validator that fact-checks each round

repos.name: alfredojrc/gemini-mcp
repos.description: MCP server wrapping Google Gemini AI with multi-agent swarm and AI-to-AI debate capabilities

repos.name: irfanalidv/AgentEnsemble
repos.description: AgentEnsemble is a Production-ready multi-agent orchestration for Python. ReAct, Swarm, Pipeline, Debate, Router, Planner, WorkflowGraph. Observability, cost tracking, human-in-loop. Structured outputs via Pydantic + LangChain.

repos.name: LaxRaj/comp-evals
repos.description: Open-source eval: frontier models on synthetic compensation-reasoning scenarios, judged by two independent LLMs.

repos.name: qorexdevs/deterministic-horizon
repos.description: Frontier LLMs collapse past ~22 reasoning steps on state-space search, but tool delegation stays near-perfect. Benchmark, theory and code behind the Deterministic Horizon (ICML 2026).

repos.name: PundarikakshNTripathi/BioEval-Onco-JAX
repos.description: A hardware-accelerated evaluation harness utilizing JAX and Tanimoto similarity to mathematically benchmark frontier LLM hallucination rates in structural oncology therapeutics.

repos.name: FrontierCS/Frontier-CS
repos.description: A benchmark for evaluating LLMs on open-ended CS problems. Exploring the Next Frontier of Computer Science.

repos.name: pranjaltiwari12/LLM-Biology-Benchmark
repos.description: A domain-specific benchmark for evaluating scientific reasoning in frontier LLMs across molecular biology, computational genomics and systems biology

repos.name: Trusty-Squire/castellan
repos.description: Castellan — verified coding agent. You bring the inspiration; your castellan handles the rest, and proves it. Specs compile to gated loops: git is the memory, tests are the judge. Frontier results at 1/20th frontier cost.

repos.name: subhanmehmood4/subhanmehmood
repos.description: LLM Engineer & Founder @ DevAxon. Frontier AI evaluation benchmarks, production backends, and SaaS MVPs. subhanmehmood.com

repos.name: Msc-Company-Org/llm-finetune-eval
repos.description: Benchmark a fine-tuned model against your frontier-API baseline — accuracy, cost per 1k calls, latency, format adherence. A fine-tune without a before/after eval is a vibe, not an upgrade.

repos.name: yxrdhzm/promptOptimizationEngine
repos.description: LLM提示词优化引擎 - 通过测试集驱动+LLM自我迭代，自动产出比人工编写更优的系统提示词。支持 OpenAI/Anthropic/DashScope/DeepSeek/Ollama，内置 Streamlit Web UI。Automatically optimize system prompts via OPRO self-iteration with LLM-as-Judge evaluation.

repos.name: sohanur083/prompt-optimizer
repos.description: Automatic prompt optimization for LLMs. Meta-prompting + evolutionary search + A/B evaluation. DSPy/APE/OPRO alternative with a one-line API.

repos.name: murtazabaig/automatically-optimize-ai-prompts-with-openai-using-opro-dspy-methodology
repos.description: Advanced n8n automation for Automatically Optimize AI Prompts with OpenAI Using OPRO & DSPy Methodology.

repos.name: bhorev/automatic-prompt-optimization
repos.description: Automatic Prompt Optimization OPRO implementation with Amazon Bedrock

repos.name: DaylaHoang/entropix
repos.description: Cost-aware LLM inference gateway. Routes requests via per-token Shannon entropy — 91.6% cost reduction, 98.2% accuracy.
